delphi_nhsn_covid.long_name: Number of COVID hospitalizations in the National Healthcare Safety Network
delphi_nhsn_covid.short_description: Weekly count of COVID-19 associated hospital admissions reported to CDC's NHSN.
delphi_nhsn_covid.long_description: The National Healthcare Safety Network (NHSN) is the nation's most widely used healthcare-associated infection tracking system. This dataset reports preliminary and finalized weekly hospital respiratory data and metrics aggregated to national and state/territory levels. Values are available for reference dates beginning August 2020. HHS collects data from state and territorial health departments about many, but not all, hospitals in the U.S. Notably excluded from this dataset are psychiatric and rehabilitation facilities, and religious non-medical facilities.

delphi_nhsn_flu.long_name: Number of influenza hospitalizations in the National Healthcare Safety Network
delphi_nhsn_flu.short_description: Weekly count of influenza-associated hospital admissions reported to CDC's NHSN.
delphi_nhsn_flu.long_description: The National Healthcare Safety Network (NHSN) is the nation's most widely used healthcare-associated infection tracking system. This dataset reports preliminary and finalized weekly hospital respiratory data and metrics aggregated to national and state/territory levels. Values are available for reference dates beginning August 2020. HHS collects data from state and territorial health departments about many, but not all, hospitals in the U.S. Notably excluded from this dataset are psychiatric and rehabilitation facilities, and religious non-medical facilities.

delphi_nhsn_rsv.long_name: Number of RSV hospitalizations in the National Healthcare Safety Network
delphi_nhsn_rsv.short_description: Weekly count of RSV-associated hospital admissions reported to CDC's NHSN.
delphi_nhsn_rsv.long_description: The National Healthcare Safety Network (NHSN) is the nation's most widely used healthcare-associated infection tracking system. This dataset reports preliminary and finalized weekly hospital respiratory data and metrics aggregated to national and state/territory levels. Note: RSV data from the pre-October 31, 2024 voluntary reporting period has limited quality due to low hospital participation rates.

delphi_nhsn.name: CMU Delphi COVIDcast - NHSN Respiratory Hospitalizations
delphi_nhsn.organization: Carnegie Mellon University Delphi Research Group
delphi_nhsn.description: Weekly hospital respiratory data reported to CDC's National Healthcare Safety Network (NHSN), accessed via the CMU Delphi Epidata API. NHSN is the nation's most widely used healthcare-associated infection tracking system, collecting data from hospitals across the United States. The data includes COVID-19, influenza, and RSV associated hospital admissions aggregated to national and state levels. Data collection became mandatory for hospitals in November 2024; prior to this, reporting was voluntary with variable participation rates.
delphi_nhsn.restrictions: CC-BY Attribution license. Data may be used with attribution to the CMU Delphi Group and CDC NHSN.
